name: HTR: Hyper Torque Racing
short_description: "HTR: Hyper Torque Racing" is a racing game with easy controls that lets you experience realistic racing. Other than single-player, you can also enjoy online multiplayer with up to 8 players. Win intense races and become the world's best racer!
detailed_description:
"HTR: Hyper Torque Racing" is a racing game that lets you experience realistic racing through easy controls.

■ Go for the win at the World Championships!

"Hyper Torque Mode" is the main mode to which you will belong as a racer to join the competitions held in various countries. Win and progress through the competitions and aim for victory in the world championship.

■ Single-player mode is challenging enough!

In Hyper Torque mode, there are nine tournaments to participate in, and you can even create and hold your own custom competitions. Plus, the game features free races for casual play and a split-screen mode for two-player battles!

■ Multiplayer is also supported!

You can race online with up to 8 players from around the world. Win intense races and prove yourself to be the best racer in the world.

■Extensive Achievement System

The game supports achievement and ranking systems. You can visibly track your achievements.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Dutch, Portuguese - Brazil, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, Korean
